assumptions.detail: TanStack Query is unsupported — using React hooks with manual fetch and Firestore listeners instead
Zustand is unsupported — using React useState/useContext for state management instead
Firebase Cloud Functions are unsupported — copy count increment handled client-side via Firestore updateDoc
Cloud Scheduler is unsupported — sync is triggered manually via admin UI button instead of automatic hourly schedule
GitHub Actions CI/CD is unsupported — skipping CI/CD pipeline entirely
Google Docs API / Google Drive API are unsupported — sync endpoints are stubbed; prompts are managed via manual CRUD
Algolia search uses client-side algoliasearch with provided API keys; falls back to client-side text filtering if Algolia index is empty or unavailable
Admin role is determined by a 'role' field in the Firestore 'users' collection — must be manually set to 'admin' in Firestore console
Default Firestore database is DATASTORE_MODE — using named database 'superprompt-library' in Firestore Native mode
Suppressed prompts carry suppressedManually flag as specified; sync stub respects this flag conceptually but sync is not operational without Google Docs API
